SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.view.manager

Class UIHelper

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.view.manager.UIHelper
public class UIHelper extends Object
Utility class for common UI operations to reduce code duplication. Provides null-safe UI updates, visibility control, and time formatting.
Author:
Dong, Jia

    Safely sets text on a label, checking for null first.

  • Method Details

    • setTextSafe

      public static void setTextSafe(javafx.scene.control.Label label, String text)
      Safely sets text on a label, checking for null first.
      Parameters:
      label - the label to update, may be null
      text - the text to set

    • setTextSafe

      public static void setTextSafe(javafx.scene.control.Label label, String prefix, int value)
      Safely sets text on a label with integer value, checking for null first.
      Parameters:
      label - the label to update, may be null
      prefix - the text prefix
      value - the integer value to append

    • setTextSafe

      public static void setTextSafe(javafx.scene.control.Label label, String prefix, long value)
      Safely sets text on a label with long value, checking for null first.
      Parameters:
      label - the label to update, may be null
      prefix - the text prefix
      value - the long value to append

    • showNode

      public static void showNode(javafx.scene.Node node)
      Safely shows a node by setting both visible and managed to true.
      Parameters:
      node - the node to show, may be null

    • hideNode

      public static void hideNode(javafx.scene.Node node)
      Safely hides a node by setting both visible and managed to false.
      Parameters:
      node - the node to hide, may be null

    • formatTimeMillis

      public static String formatTimeMillis(long millis)
      Formats milliseconds into MM:SS time string.
      Parameters:
      millis - the time in milliseconds
      Returns:
      formatted time string "MM:SS"

    • formatTimeSeconds

      public static String formatTimeSeconds(long totalSeconds)
      Formats seconds into MM:SS time string.
      Parameters:
      totalSeconds - the time in seconds
      Returns:
      formatted time string "MM:SS"

    • formatTimeWithPrefix

      public static String formatTimeWithPrefix(String prefix, long millis)
      Formats time for display with a prefix.
      Parameters:
      prefix - the prefix text (e.g., "Time: ", "Best Time: ")
      millis - the time in milliseconds
      Returns:
      formatted time string with prefix

    • isNullOrEmpty

      public static boolean isNullOrEmpty(String str)
      Checks if a string is null or empty.
      Parameters:
      str - the string to check
      Returns:
      true if null or empty, false otherwise

    • equalsSafe

      public static boolean equalsSafe(Object obj1, Object obj2)
      Safely compares two objects for equality, handling nulls.
      Parameters:
      obj1 - first object
      obj2 - second object
      Returns:
      true if both are null or equal, false otherwise
